yeast-buns-in-the-pan-argiro.name: Yeast Buns In The Pan

ingredients.item: 15 gras fresh or 1/2 sachet dry yeast
1 tablespoon olive oil or melted butter
A little bit of semolina or corn meal
15 gras fresh or 1/2 sachet dry yeast
1 tablespoon olive oil or melted butter
A little bit of semolina or corn meal

instructions: First sift flour and salt in a medium bowl.
If you use fresh yeast, you should activate it.
We puddle in half to flour and add all the ingredients except fatty substance, oil or butter.
Mix with a soft spatula until we have a soft, elastic and malleable dough.
Place your hands on the oil or melted butter and knead the dough a little.
Add a bowl and add the dough.
We leave it covered with membrane to double in volume for about 1 hour, depending on the temperature of the space.
Gently sprinkle the counter with flour.
Remove the dough on the counter and bake lightly.
Spread it into a thick leaf with a mold of 1 cm thick.
We use a sharp knife or paddle – p 7.5 cm and cut 9-10 pieces disc.

yogurt-mousse-with-5-ingredients-telecul.name: Yogurt Mousse With 5 Ingredients

ingredients.item: 4  (125 g cada)  iogurtes cremosos com sabor a gosto

instructions: Lay the yogurt contents in a bowl, add the powdered sugar and stir well.

Drain the gelatin leaves in cold water for 5 minutes. Drip and melt in the microwave or in a sea bath without letting it boil. Then add to the yogurt preparation, in yarn and always stirring very well. Reserve.
On the other hand, beat the cream until it thickens and then wrap it in the previous preparation. Crush the cookies until they're powdered.
In a glass bowl, have successive layers of biscuit and yogurt cream, sprinkled in the end with a little cookie. Take it to the fridge for about two hours.
